extension.disclaimer: This addon streams content from Webshare.cz. You need a valid Webshare account. The addon author is not responsible for the content hosted on Webshare.
Tento doplnok streamuje obsah z Webshare.cz. Potrebujete platný Webshare účet. Autor doplnku nezodpovedá za obsah umiestnený na Webshare.
Tento doplněk streamuje obsah z Webshare.cz. Potřebujete platný Webshare účet. Autor doplňku neodpovídá za obsah umístěný na Webshare.
extension.news: [B]1.1.3[/B] - fix: "(2010) Title" movies (year-first naming) now group under the correct year instead of going ungrouped - fix: resolution width (1920x1080) no longer mistaken for the release year - fix: dual-name aliases with hyphen/multi-space separators no longer pick up quality/episode metadata as a fake alias - fix: 3-letter searches match again (e.g. "man" finds Manifest) - fix: series grouping is order-independent (spinoff detection no longer depends on result order) - perf: faster grouping on large result sets (quality parsing cached; redundant re-sorts removed) [B]1.1.2[/B] - fix: movie sequels (Avatar 2, Top Gun 2) no longer shown as fake TV episodes - fix: episode-titled releases (Show - Episode Title S01E01) group into one series - fix: bracketed markers (Westworld 2016 (S01E01)) correctly listed under Series - fix: movie year detection — Blade Runner 2049 / Death Race 2000 use the real release year - fix: Czech titles with "a" (Tom a Jerry) no longer mangled - fix: version dialog ranks by quality (x265 BluRay above bloated x264) - fix: display names keep sequel numbers (Cobra Kai 3) - fix: search relevance — csi finds C.S.I.; "her" no longer pulls in Mother - fix: large series no longer drop episodes mid-list (pagination) - fix: bad/missing file fields no longer crash or duplicate grouping [B]1.1.1[/B] - fix: favorites identity normalized (lib/keys) — same-title different-year movies no longer remove the wrong favorite - fix: dual-name canonical_key drift collapses to one favorite (no duplicates) - fix: favorite click resolves to the correct title (normalized key, no substring sibling mix-ups) - fix: favorite click reproduces original category/sort - fix: favorites add/remove race-safe (cross-process lock) — no lost updates - fix: state-key migration v1→v2 preserves watched/resume for dual-name content after upgrade - fix: search history stored once per search, not on every page - fix: Windows file-lock unlock offset; shared safe-json write/read helpers [B]1.1.0[/B] - add favorites: save searches, series, movies (top-level menu + context add/remove) - fix: drift-aware favorite toggle survives canonical_key drift - fix: state key normalization (dual-name prefix stripped) - fix: cache locking + read-under-lock + key fragmentation - fix: kodi handler contracts (PlayMedia vs GetDirectory) - fix: hardened search history loading + atomic writes [B]1.0.9[/B] - fix: dual-name series state keyed by canonical name (cross-quality ✓ now works) - fix: search-result single-version play preserves resume/watched state - fix: movie state tracked in flat search list - fix: end-of-playback "watched" survives player-detach race - fix: per-concern tracking toggles (resume vs watched) honoured independently [B]1.0.8[/B] - add resume points + watched-state tracking (per-episode/per-movie) [B]1.0.7[/B] - fix search history stops persisting after ~20 entries - atomic write with unique tmp file to prevent concurrent-writer corruption - guard malformed shistory setting with 20-item fallback - strip [FLE]/[YIFY]/etc bracket release tags from movie canonical keys [B]1.0.6[/B] - fix grouping bugs: dedup, orphan merge, cross-year, genre words, ep marker - refactor UI into search_ui and series_ui modules - sort movies by version count, merge dual-key movies - improve cache re-fetch at 500 limit [B]1.0.5[/B] - add preferred audio/subtitle language selection with fallback [B]1.0.4[/B] - add webshare unique ID for watched status persistence [B]1.0.3[/B] - fix parsing false positives - improve grouping performance - add movie substring merging for better grouping - normalize separators in csfd_scraper canonical keys [B]1.0.2[/B] - add thread-safe cache with TTL expiration - add word-order series merging (handles reordered titles) - improve API error handling and token refresh - new localized error messages for playback issues - enable movie grouping without experimental mode - add unit test infrastructure [B]1.0.1[/B] - fix: include csfd_scraper.py in repository builds [B]1.0.0[/B] - rebrand to Ye-Playa - based on YAWsP by cache-sk (https://www.xbmc-kodi.cz/prispevek-yet-another-webshare-plugin) - i18n: extract hardcoded strings to language resources - improve navigation: remove prev button, add back to search menu - reduce duplicate file groups in selection dialogs - hide back to search button on first page (use .. instead)

extension.description: Official repository for Ye-Playa - Webshare.cz video plugin for Kodi. Install this repository to receive automatic updates for Ye-Playa.
